name: Pinstripe
description: Fine pinstripes tilt and turn, the suiting re-pressing itself on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 16%, var(--color0) 16% 32%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
